name: Propple
short_description: A somewhat rage-inducing physics-based puzzle game about manipulating objects with your mouse cursor. Gently nudge, quickly knock, or try to carry any objects to bring them to their target.
detailed_description:
Propple is a somewhat rage-inducing physics-based puzzle game about getting objects from one place to another. The trick is, you can only interact with objects using a circle around the mouse cursor.

In each level, you will be given a limited set of objects, with one or more that need to be moved somewhere else by the end of the level. You will need to move the objects using other objects or the mouse cursor's hitbox. Once all objects are at their targets for three seconds, the level is complete.

There are 36 total levels, with two level packs separated by a key difference in level structure. Levels aren't time-limited, but they record best times, creating an extra challenge for skilled players. Each level has its own global leaderboard visible after completing the level.
